title: Introduction to Java
description: The Creation of Java, Java Buzzwords, JVM, JRE, JDK architecture, Bytecode, Platform independence, Writing and running Java programs, OOP principles.

title: Fundamental Programming Structures
description: Comments, primitive data types, variables, constants, type conversion, casting, operators, control statements, loops, arrays, BigInteger, BigDecimal.

title: Classes and Objects
description: OOP principles, defining classes, creating objects, methods, constructors, this keyword, access control, static members, final keyword, Object class, nested classes, garbage collection, packages.

title: Inheritance and Interfaces
description: Inheritance basics, super keyword, method overriding, dynamic method dispatch, abstract classes, interfaces, default and static methods, functional interfaces, sealed classes.

title: Exception Handling
description: Exception hierarchy, checked vs unchecked exceptions, try-catch-finally, multiple catch, multi-catch, try-with-resources, throw, throws, custom exceptions.

title: Generics and Collections
description: Generic classes and methods, bounded wildcards, type erasure, Collections Framework (List, Set, Map, Queue), Iterators, wrapper classes, autoboxing and unboxing.

title: Multithreaded Programming
description: Thread model, Thread class, Runnable interface, creating threads, isAlive(), join(), thread priorities, synchronization, race conditions.

title: Essential Java Classes
description: String class, StringBuffer, StringBuilder, Math class, wrapper classes, introduction to Lambda Expressions and Stream API.

title: File Handling
description: File class, byte streams, character streams, BufferedReader, BufferedWriter, PrintWriter, RandomAccessFile, serialization, NIO.2 API, Console class.
